meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes Subcommittee on the taxonomy of phototrophic bacteria. Minutes of the meetings, 27 August 2003, Tokyo, Japan
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: On page 1002, in Table 1 of the printed and PDF versions of this article, the abbreviations given for Rhodovulum and Rhodobaca are incorrect; they should be Rdv. and Rca., respectively. Also, all abbreviations should end with a full stop. A new version of Table 1, which incorporates the aforementioned corrections, can be found below.
